Fanfare: An ability that takes effect when the card is put onto the field. It takes effect whether the card is played from hand or put onto the field by another ability.
Last Words: An ability that takes effect when the card is moved from your field into the cemetery.
Quick: Cards with Quick can also be played during your opponent's turn, at these timings: (1) when an enemy follower attacks, (2) during your opponent's end phase.
Activated Abilities: Abilities that can be activated anytime during your main phase. They may be used on the turn a card comes into play, even if the activation cost involves engaging.
Strike: An ability that takes effect during your turn when a follower with Strike attacks, before combat damage is dealt.
Intimidate: Followers with this ability can't be attacked by enemy followers, but they can still be selected by abilities.
Aura: Cards with this ability can't be selected by enemy abilities, but they can still be attacked.
Assail: Followers with this ability can attack reserved (vertical) enemy followers, unless those followers have Intimidate.
Ward: When attacking, if your opponent has any engaged followers with Ward, you must select one of them to attack.
Storm: Followers with Storm may attack the enemy leader or engaged enemy followers the turn they are put onto the field.
Rush: Followers with Rush may attack engaged enemy followers the turn they are put onto the field.
Drain: When a follower with Drain deals attack damage while attacking, your leader gains the same amount of defense.
Bane: When a follower with Bane attacks or is attacked by an enemy follower, destroy that enemy follower after combat.
Combo: Combo abilities take effect if you've played at least X cards that turn. (Cards with Combo count themselves.)
Spellchain: Spellchain abilities take effect if there are at least X spells in your cemetery.
Earth Rite: Earth Rite abilities take effect by removing 1 Stack counter from your field.
Stack: Cards with Stack are put onto the field with 1 Stack counter.
Overflow: Overflow is considered active when your maximum number of play points is at least 7.
Necrocharge: Necrocharge abilities take effect if you have at least X cards in your cemetery.
Sanguine: Sanguine is considered active if your leader's defense has decreased during your turn.
Evolve: Evolve a follower on your field by paying its evolve cost, then place its evolved version from your evolve deck on top of it.
Engage: To engage a card is to turn it horizontally. Engaged (horizontal) followers can't attack until they refresh; reserved (vertical) followers can.
